title: Crispy Baozi with Tempeh Filling
description: A Chinese-inspired vegetarian snack featuring crispy baozi filled with a savory tempeh mixture.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Cut baozi dough into small pieces and fry until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat sesame oil over medium heat.
Add crumbled tempeh and cook, breaking apart with a spatula, until lightly browned.
Add crispy soy sauce and xtra hot sauce (if using) to the tempeh mixture and stir to combine.
To assemble the baozi, place a few pieces of crispy dough on a flat surface.
Spoon the tempeh mixture onto the dough and fold the dough to form a triangle or square.
Brush the top of the baozi with sesame oil and garnish with chopped green onions.
